name: invoiced_cost
label: Cost (Total Blended)
description: This cost metric is specific to AWS and corresponds to the lineItem/BlendedCost column of the CUR file. This metric “blends” the impact of reserved instances and savings plans.

name: blended_rate
label: Rate (Blended)
description: For Consolidated Billing accounts, the effective rate for the line item calculated as an average of the cost of identical instances operating in that hour in the same Availability Zone.

name: usage_hours
label: Usage Hours
description: The number of computing resources used in the units specified by each service. For example, your service may determine pricing by the amount of storage, number of requests, or hours of operation.

name: io_requests
label: I/O Requests
description: Describes the number of data requests from a database service.

name: requests
label: Requests
description: The number of computing resources used in the units specified by each service. For example, your service may determine pricing by the amount of storage, number of requests, or hours of operation.

name: gb_months
label: GiB Months
description: References byte-hours, which corresponds to the number of bytes stored on an AWS, Azure, GCP or OCI storage service in a particular hourly period.

name: byte_hours
label: GiB Hours
description: A gigabyte-hour refers to the number of gigabytes stored on a cloud platform in a particular hourly period.

name: invoice_date
label: Invoice Date
description: The invoice date for any cost item as provided by the cloud vendor. This is reported in "Mon DD, YYYY" format. Cloud consumption during the month is usually given an invoice date of the first day of that month.

name: date
label: Date
description: The calendar date - formatted "Mon DD, YYYY" (Aug 9, 2022).

name: year
label: Year
description: The calendar year any cost item was occurred, formatted YYYY (for example, 2022).

name: month
label: Month (Category)
description: The month any cost item was incurred, formatted "Mon". Examples "Jun", "Jul", "Aug". This is useful for looking at costs by month for any year (such as show costs that occurred in July of any year).

name: day
label: Day
description: The numeric calendar day (for example, "Aug 9, 2022" => 9).

name: day_of_week
label: Day of Week
description: The day of week (for example, Monday).

name: vendor
label: Vendor
description: The cloud vendor associated with the cost item. Valid values are Amazon, Azure, GCP and OCI.

name: seller
label: Seller
description: The official seller of services. Using this dimension allows you to separate marketplace charges from your other cloud costs.

name: service_name
label: Product Name
description: The official product name as provided by the vendor (for example, Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud, GCP Cloud Storage, Microsoft.Compute or OCI Compute).

name: region
label: Region
description: The region in which a resource exists or a usage charge occurred, for example: us-east-1 for AWS, US East for Azure, us-east1 for GCP and us-ashburn-1 for OCI.

name: zone
label: Zone
description: This field is specific to AWS, it corresponds to the letter for a specific zone in which an instance exists or a usage charge occured within an Availability Zone. This field is not used for Azure, GCP or OCI.

name: region_zone
label: Availability Zone
description: A combination of the region and zone in which a resource exists. For example, us-east-1a.

name: item_description
label: Item Description
description: Description of the type of usage for this line item. This description matches the description on the Bills page, including the average price of any usage that is based on a volume pricing tier.

name: account_identifier
label: Payer Account ID
description: The unique identifier related to the AWS management account, Azure EA/MCA agreement, GCP Billing Account or OCI Root Tenancy.

name: account_name
label: Payer Account Name
description: The name related to the AWS management account, Azure EA/MCA agreement, GCP Billing Account or OCI Root Tenancy. Depending on your situation this value may fall back to the unique billing ID.

name: vendor_account_name
label: Account Name
description: The name given by the customer that's attached to each AWS Account, Azure Subscription, GCP Project or OCI Tenancy.

name: vendor_account_identifier
label: Account ID
description: The unique identifier related to a AWS Account, Azure Subscription, GCP Project or OCI Tenancy.

name: usage_type
label: Usage Type
description: Specifies operational details of the usage line item. The following example describes Amazon EC2 High-Memory Double ExtraLarge Instance box usage in the US West (Oregon) region. Example: USW1-BoxUsage:m2.2xlarge

name: week
label: Week (Category)
description: The week any cost item was incurred, formatted "WW". Examples "01", "15", "52". This is useful for looking at costs by the week for any year (such as show costs that occurred in week 1 of any year).

name: bytes_transferred
label: Data Transfer (GiB)
description: The amount of data transferred in a particular time period.

name: transaction_type
label: Transaction Type
description: A new dimension created by Cloudability to break costs into Usage, One-Time Charges, Recurring Charges, Amortized Charges, Credits, Taxes, or Rounding.

name: instance_category
label: Instance Category
description: The category of VM or Database an instance belongs to. Common categories include General Purpose, Compute Optimized and Memory Optimized.

name: unblended_cost
label: Cost (Total)
description: This is the default cost metric throughout Cloudability. It is a “cash” metric and simply represents the invoiced amount associated with any cost item as reported by the cloud vendor.

name: unblended_rate
label: Rate (Unblended)
description: The cost per hour for a line item. This is summarized across the hours of a day.

name: reserved_hours
label: Reserved Hours
description: The amount of reserved computing hours used during the reporting period.

name: on_demand_hours
label: On Demand Hours
description: The amount of on demand computing hours used during the reporting period.

name: reserved_utilization_rate
label: Reserved Coverage Rate
description: The percentage of total hours used during the period where an RI was applied.

name: usage_quantity
label: Usage Quantity
description: Generic usage quantity. Units will vary on dimensions and filters.

name: instance_family
label: Instance Family
description: The family of VM or Database an instance belongs to. This will typically form the prefix to the full instance type definition.

name: instance_size
label: Instance Size
description: The size of VM or Database. This is correlated to key resource attributes such as the number of CPUs and available memory.

name: instance_type
label: Instance Type
description: The  full identifier of the type of VM or Database instance, capturing both the family and size. This value forms one complete component of the product SKU (used alongside location and OS).

name: compute_usage_type
label: Compute Usage Type
description: Handy Cloudability-defined dimension for understanding the type of compute for some AWS services such as EC2 and RDS.

name: resource_identifier
label: Resource ID
description: The resource is the base entity that users can work with in the cloud. Examples are Instance Ids, Lambda Functions, S3 storage buckets.

name: resource_identifier_count
label: Resource Count
description: The count of ?unique? resource ids in the period specified.

name: operation
label: Operation
description: The operation data represents the action that was taken on the asset.  This often relates to a CLI command.

name: operating_system
label: Operating System
description: The operating system for VMs as reported by the cloud vendors for billing purposes. Example values: Linux, Windows, Red Hat Enterprise Linux.

name: engine
label: Engine
description: The database or cache engine (for example, Oracle, SQL Server, MySQL or Redis).

name: total_amortized_cost
label: Cost (Amortized)
description: This is an “accrual” cost metric, representing the consumed cost during any period. This metric is handy for ensuring commitments are allocated to the time and place they are consumed.

name: reservation_identifier
label: Reservation ID
description: The unique ID of the commitment (such as reserved instance and savings plan) tied to any cost item as provided by the cloud vendor.

name: usage_family
label: Usage Family
description: A standardized dimension created by Cloudability to consolidate similar values of Usage Type into a single high-level family (e.g. Data Transfer, Storage, API Request). To see the original values, add the Usage Type dimension.

name: lease_type
label: Lease Type
description: The payment mode for the cost items. Valid values are: On-Demand, Savings Plan, Reserved and Spot. This is a reporting dimension defined by Cloudability to support multi-cloud cost categorization.

name: enhanced_service_name
label: Service Name
description: A dimension defined by Cloudability that standardizes product naming conventions for AWS, Azure, GCP and OCI. To surface the original product names, use the Product Name dimension instead.

name: year_month
label: Month (Year)
description: The month and year of any cost item (formatted Month YYYY) useful for proper chronological sorting. Examples: July 2021, September 2022.

name: year_week
label: Week (Year)
description: The week and year of any cost item (formatted YYYY-WW) useful for proper chronological sorting. Examples: 2021-06, 2022-52.

name: cost_adjusted
label: Cost Adjustment
description: The amount by which the cost was adjusted.

name: adjusted_cost
label: Cost (Adjusted)
description: Built from the cost (total) metric, this metric adjusts the figures to allow for any custom pricing rules. It only appears for Cloudability customers who have turned on the custom pricing module.

name: cost_adjustment_description
label: Cost Adjustment Description
description: Description of the cost adjustment rule applied.

name: total_adjusted_amortized_cost
label: Cost (Adjusted Amortized)
description: Built from the cost (amortized) metric, this metric adjusts the figures to allow for any custom pricing rules. It only appears for Cloudability customers who have turned on the custom pricing module.

name: public_on_demand_cost
label: Cost (List)
description: This metric represents cost items as if they were charged at the public on-demand rate. This means the impact of any commitments, spot instance pricing, and custom pricing are removed.

name: tenancy
label: Tenancy
description: AWS specific dimension identifying the tenancy of EC2 instances. Three valid values are shared, host and dedicated. "shared" is the default value.

name: offering_class
label: Reservation Class
description: The commitment offering tied to any cost item. Example values include “standard” and “convertible” reserved instances, “EC2InstanceSavingsPlans” and “ComputeSavingsPlans” for savings plans.

name: container_cluster_name
label: Cluster Name
description: The Kubernetes "Cluster Name" that the underlying cost items - such as VM, storage and network costs - belong to. The value matches the name setup by your admin when provisioning the cluster within Cloudability.

name: container_namespace
label: Namespace
description: Kubernetes Namespace

name: invoice_id
label: Invoice ID
description: The invoice ID that corresponds to any charged cost item, as provided by AWS. Data is not currently available for Azure, GCP and OCI.

name: atum_service_name
label: ATUM Service Name
description: Lowest level of the ATUM Service taxonomy (e.g. Threat & Vulnerability Management).

name: atum_service_type
label: ATUM Service Type
description: Highest level of the ATUM Service taxonomy (e.g., workplace, business, platform, infrastructure).

name: atum_service_category
label: ATUM Service Category
description: Middle level of the ATUM Service taxonomy (e.g., client computing, communication & collaboration).

name: ancestry_numbers
label: GCP Ancestry Numbers
description: This dimension displays the ancestry information of a given GCP project (for example billing account/folder[1..n]).  This information is gathered from "project.ancestry" column from GCP billing data.

name: currency_code
label: Currency Code
description: 3 letter ISO currency code.

name: adjusted_fairshare_cost
label: Fairshare Cost (Adjusted)
description: This is calculated by dividing the sum of the used resources for the container by the total used resources of all containers running on the same hardware, and then multiplying it by the cost of the hardware

name: adjusted_utilized_cost
label: Utilized Cost (Adjusted)
description: The utilized cost refers to the cost incurred by the resources utilized by a workload for a given time range (can be further broken down or grouped by cluster, namespace, labels)

name: adjusted_idle_cost
label: Idle Cost (Adjusted)
description: The idle cost refers to the cost incurred by resources that are not used by any workload for a given time range

name: adjusted_amortized_fairshare_cost
label: Fairshare Cost (Adjusted Amortized)
description: This is calculated by dividing the sum of the used resources for the container by the total used resources of all containers running on the same hardware, and then multiplying it by the cost of the hardware

name: adjusted_amortized_utilized_cost
label: Utilized Cost (Adjusted Amortized)
description: The utilized cost refers to the cost incurred by the resources utilized by a workload for a given time range (can be further broken down or grouped by cluster, namespace, labels)

name: adjusted_amortized_idle_cost
label: Idle Cost (Adjusted Amortized)
description: The idle cost refers to the cost incurred by resources that are not used by any workload for a given time range

name: part_number
label: Part Number
description: This field is specific to Azure and OCI. It corresponds to the identifier used to get specific meter pricing.

name: azure_reservation_order_name
label: Azure Reservation Order Name
description: The name or description of the product or service that was ordered or consumed (Azure specific).

name: reservation_name
label: Reservation Name
description: The name of the purchased reservation instance (Azure specific).

name: vcpu_hours
label: vCPU Hours
description: Normalized CPU hours are calculated by multiplying the CPU hours used by the number of vCPUs used.

name: carbon_emissions
label: Estimated Carbon Emissions (MTCO2e)
description: Estimated Carbon emissions by a resource in metric tons of carbon dioxide equivalent - MTCO2e

name: kwh_consumption
label: Power Consumed (kWh)
description: Power consumed by a resource in Kilo Watt Hours - kWh

name: resource_name
label: Resource Name
description: Resources are named entities, and the resource_name is its identifier. Each resource has its own unique resource name. This value is from the CSP billing files.

name: atum_tower
label: ATUM Tower
description: High-level IT service category

name: atum_subtower
label: ATUM Sub-Tower
description: Subcategory within the ATUM Tower

name: embodied_emissions
label: Embodied Carbon Emissions (MTCO2e)
description: Embodied Carbon Emissions in metric tons of carbon dioxide equivalent - MTCO2e

name: operational_emissions
label: Operational Carbon Emissions (MTCO2e)
description: Operational Carbon Emissions in metric tons of carbon dioxide equivalent - MTCO2e

name: raw_currency_code
label: Raw Currency Code
description: The original currency code from the cloud provider's billing data (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)

name: exchange_rate
label: Exchange Rate
description: The exchange rate applied to convert costs from the original currency to your organization's reporting currency

name: billing_exchange_rate
label: Billing Currency Rate
description: The exchange rate used by the cloud provider for billing purposes
